title: K-200 GCS Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 GCS Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-465-G. Revision: G. Type: ICD. Author: Tobias Wren. Created: 2025-05-27. Last modified: 2026-04-30. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1056.
